children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: A funding agreement for a grant under is that the State involved will establish and maintain a State mental health planning council in accordance with the conditions described in this section.section 300x of this title
to review plans provided to the Council pursuant to by the State involved and to submit to the State any recommendations of the Council for modifications to the plans;section 300x–4(a) of this title
to serve as an advocate for adults with a serious mental illness, children with a severe emotional disturbance, and other individuals with mental illnesses or emotional problems; and
to monitor, review, and evaluate, not less than once each year, the allocation and adequacy of mental health services within the State.

children.label: i
children.text: mental health, education, vocational rehabilitation, criminal justice, housing, and social services; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the development of the plan submitted pursuant to title XIX of the Social Security Act [ et seq.];42 U.S.C. 1396

children.label: B
children.text: public and private entities concerned with the need, planning, operation, funding, and use of mental health services and related support services;

children.label: C
children.text: adults with serious mental illnesses who are receiving (or have received) mental health services; and

children.label: D
children.text: the families of such adults or families of children with emotional disturbance.

children.label: A
children.text: with respect to the membership of the Council, the ratio of parents of children with a serious emotional disturbance to other members of the Council is sufficient to provide adequate representation of such children in the deliberations of the Council; and

children.label: B
children.text: not less than 50 percent of the members of the Council are individuals who are not State employees or providers of mental health services.

children.heading: “Council” defined
children.label: d “Council” defined
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “Council” means a State mental health planning council.
